subject: Project deadline update
body: The project deadline has been moved to next Friday. Please ensure all deliverables are completed by then. Let me know if you have any blockers.

subject: Let's grab coffee
body: Hey! Want to grab coffee this weekend? I miss catching up with you. Let me know when you're free!

subject: Click here to win prizes!
body: You have been selected to win 1 million dollars! Click the link below to claim your prize NOW! www.definitely-not-spam.com

subject: Team standup meeting
body: Hi team, our daily standup is at 10 AM today. Please come prepared with your updates.

subject: Your account verification
body: Please verify your bank account by clicking here: [link]. Your account has been locked for security purposes.

subject: Family dinner this Sunday
body: Hi! Just checking if you can make it to family dinner this Sunday at 6 PM. Let me know!

subject: Benefits enrollment deadline
body: This is a reminder that benefits enrollment closes on Friday. Please log into the portal and select your plans.

subject: URGENT: Your account has been compromised
body: CLICK HERE IMMEDIATELY to reset your password! Your account may be compromised! Act now!

subject: Code review for feature X
body: I've submitted the code for feature X. Could you review it and provide feedback? Let me know if you have questions.

subject: How are you doing?
body: Hi there! Just wanted to check in and see how you're doing. Let's catch up soon!
